programme.title: Front Row: DC

programme.title: Beyond the Buzzer
programme.desc: The Wizards are making time for connection and fun by teeing it up for charity at Ballers and Birdies, welcoming a special fan to practice, and sharing a courtside moment with Capitals legend, Alex Ovechkin. Plus, Wes Hall gets the inside scoop on Bub Carrington's pre-game ritual!

programme.title: SBJ: Inside the Industry
programme.desc: The Olympic flame is burning bright! Host Tarik and Abe are joined in studio by SBJ's Olympic reporter Rachel Axon and gold medalist Thea LaFond, who discuss their Olympic experiences and dig into the development, logistics, and evolution of the world's greatest athletic events. Featured interviews with Sarah Hirshland, the CEO of the US Olympic and Paralympic Committee, and Catherine Gosselin-Després, the Chief Sport Officer of the Canadian Paralympic Committee.

programme.title: Hometown With Rachel Nichols

programme.title: Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza
programme.desc: In this episode of Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza: America's Gladiators, Chris talks military service and fitness with two American warriors serving in Congress. Former Naval Intelligence Officer, Jimmy Panetta (D-CA), and former US Marine and USN Emergency room physician Rich McCormick (R-GA). Along the way, Chris skates through the halls of Congress, takes a stab at the Marine Sword Salute, and has his fitness tested by a real American Gladiator.

programme.title: Rare USMC Silver
programme.desc: Celebrate the US Marine Corps with these specially struck 2025 Silver Dollars graded PF69 and PF70, honoring the USMC 250th Anniversary. Both feature a depiction of the flag raising at Iwo Jima, the USMC motto "Semper Fidelis", and the USMC emblem.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026CongratulationsSet Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM. This coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: 1900 Rare Gold Coins
programme.desc: This is your opportunity to add a turn of the century 1900-P Liberty Head Gold Double Eagle graded in either stunning MS63 or MS64. Only 3% of less of the entire mintage have been graded MS63 or MS64, making both examples exciting condition rarities!

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver

programme.desc: A family looks for a second home in Sosua, Dominican Republic, that its two daughters can enjoy; he's looking for plenty of land for gardening and animals, and she's concerned about a place that's spacious, with a large kitchen.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A psychologist relocates her family for a teaching opportunity in Barbados; they're looking for a place with three bedrooms that's close to her work, but she wants something furnished while he's looking to bring the things they already own.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Stretching the Dollar in Nha Trang, Vietnam
programme.desc: A man is trying entrepreneurship by investing in a tourism company in Nha Trang, Vietnam, and he's hoping to live large with a cheaper cost of living, but massive development threatens to derail his plan.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A single mom and self-proclaimed queen follows a career opportunity to Wiesbaden, Germany with her 12-year-old son and she wants a single-family house with a crafting room, but location, price and her son must also be a factor.

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville
programme.desc: Tisha and Nell bury the hatchet; Kimmi urges Maurice to press Marsau on Jordan Lane delays; Marsau confronts Chris for not telling him sooner about losing his license; Maurice confronts Marsau, leading to threats and name-calling.

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville
programme.desc: Tisha is unhappy that Destiny has been talking about her to Kimmi and confronts Destiny at her open house. Ken admits to Will that he's hanging out with another woman and Tricia found out. Tricia tells Sharon she wishes Ken was more honest with her.

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville
programme.desc: Destiny thinks Tisha is trying to bring her down. Ken meets Tricia, with the aim of getting her back. Nell confronts Lance on his flakiness and promiscuity. Destiny hears a rumor from Twan that could cause Nell to flip. So of course, she tells her.

programme.title: Belle Collective: Birmingham
programme.desc: Funmi's fashionable Nigerian luncheon stirs unexpected truths. Tiffany's Couples Night spirals when the guest list goes rogue. Trey, Stormi's three-legged pup, makes a bold prediction as the Live countdown leaves Stormi facing unexpected drama.

programme.title: Belle Collective: Birmingham
programme.desc: Stormi makes a controversial move by uninviting one of the women to her 48-Hour Live. As the high-stakes event begins, she and Amber clash over last-minute details. K'la reveals shocking tea about her marriage and new man, leaving Funmi stunned.

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville
programme.desc: Destiny thinks Tisha is trying to bring her down. Ken meets Tricia, with the aim of getting her back. Nell confronts Lance on his flakiness and promiscuity. Destiny hears a rumor from Twan that could cause Nell to flip. So of course, she tells her.

programme.title: Love & Marriage: Detroit
programme.desc: The kids react to Brandon being back home. LaToya tries to connect with her children. Kolby feels overwhelmed with Russell's lack of support with Kyndelle. While everyone is at dinner, Bravo confronts Marcel for the way Kimberly disrespected his event.

programme.title: Love & Marriage: Detroit
programme.desc: Brandon pushes Kristina out of her comfort zone with her music. Russell celebrates his gym opening. Anthony has issues with Brandon and Bravo's friendship. LaToya and Kolby commiserate on motherhood. Anthony's podcast with Kristina goes off the rails.

programme.title: Love and Marriage: Huntsville
programme.desc: Tisha and Nell bury the hatchet; Kimmi urges Maurice to press Marsau on Jordan Lane delays; Marsau confronts Chris for not telling him sooner about losing his license; Maurice confronts Marsau, leading to threats and name-calling.

programme.title: The Man in the White Van
programme.desc: In the 1970s Florida, a driver in a white van follows a young girl seemingly everywhere she goes. As the menace escalates, her parents dismiss her fears, leading to a terrifying Halloween nightmare that shatters her world.

programme.title: Free Money
programme.desc: Prison warden Sven Sorenson (Marlon Brando) uses corrupt judge Rolf Rausenberg (Donald Sutherland) to enforce his wishes, making both men feared by their small town's residents. When Sven's twin daughters are impregnated by Bud (Charlie Sheen) and Larry (Thomas Haden Church), he forces both couples to marry. Fed up with tyrannical Sven, his sons-in-law decide to rob a passing train and make their escape. Meanwhile, Rolf's FBI agent daughter, Karen (Mira Sorvino), arrives to investigate Sven.

programme.title: The Lucky Ones
programme.desc: Stuck at a closed airport while on leave from Iraq War service, soldiers Colee Dunn (Rachel McAdams), Fred Cheaver (Tim Robbins) and T.K. Poole (Michael Peña) decide to carpool to get to their far-off destinations. Colee wants to visit with her late fiancé's family, while wounded T.K. longs to see his future wife and Fred, needing fast cash to send his son to college, is headed for a casino. During the journey, the soldiers forge a bond based on their uncertain futures.

programme.title: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: Forty-year-old pitcher Billy Chapel (Kevin Costner) is practically a dinosaur by professional baseball standards, fast approaching the end of his career. But, as Chapel stands on the mound pitching the game of his life, his thoughts don't turn to his prized history in sports, but rather return again and again to his tumultuous relationship with Jane Aubrey (Kelly Preston), a single mom who has stood at his side through the good and the bad but is now on the verge of leaving him.

programme.title: The Waterboy
programme.desc: Raised by his overprotective mother, Helen, Bobby Boucher Jr. is the water boy for a successful college football team coached by Red Beaulieu. When Beaulieu fires Bobby, he takes up the same position for a losing rival team, led by despairing Coach Klein. After witnessing Bobby beat up a player who teased him too much, Klein adds him to the roster as a linebacker. Soon, Klein's players are championship contenders.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: In 1987, Jordan Belfort takes an entry-level job at a Wall Street brokerage firm. By the early 1990s, while still in his 20s, Belfort founds his own firm, Stratton Oakmont. Together with his trusted lieutenant and a merry band of brokers, Belfort makes a huge fortune by defrauding wealthy investors out of millions. However, while Belfort and his cronies partake in a hedonistic brew of sex, drugs and thrills, the SEC and the FBI close in on his empire of excess.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: The human race stands on the brink of extinction as a series of alien attacks decimate the planet, causing earthquakes, tsunamis and disease. Separated from her family, Ohio teenager Cassie Sullivan (Chloë Grace Moretz) will do whatever it takes to reunite with her brother Sam. Fate leads her to form an alliance with Evan Walker (Alex Roe), a mysterious young man who may be her last hope. Forced to trust each other, Cassie and Evan fight for survival during the fifth assault from the invaders.

programme.title: The Waterboy
programme.desc: Raised by his overprotective mother, Helen, Bobby Boucher Jr. is the water boy for a successful college football team coached by Red Beaulieu. When Beaulieu fires Bobby, he takes up the same position for a losing rival team, led by despairing Coach Klein. After witnessing Bobby beat up a player who teased him too much, Klein adds him to the roster as a linebacker. Soon, Klein's players are championship contenders.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Everything that can possibly go wrong for groom-to-be Greg Focker does. The problems begin with Greg's disastrous first meeting with his girlfriend's family -- most notably her intimidating father Jack Byrnes, and it's all downhill from there.

programme.title: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: Forty-year-old pitcher Billy Chapel (Kevin Costner) is practically a dinosaur by professional baseball standards, fast approaching the end of his career. But, as Chapel stands on the mound pitching the game of his life, his thoughts don't turn to his prized history in sports, but rather return again and again to his tumultuous relationship with Jane Aubrey (Kelly Preston), a single mom who has stood at his side through the good and the bad but is now on the verge of leaving him.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A young couple suffering from arrested development are forced to live next to a fraternity house after the birth of their newborn baby.

programme.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: Life is good for Mac Radner (Seth Rogen) and pregnant wife Kelly (Rose Byrne) until the unruly sisters of Kappa Nu move in next door. As the loud parties threaten the sale of their home, the couple turn to ex-neighbor and one-time enemy Teddy Sanders (Zac Efron) for help. Now united with the former college student, the trio devises schemes to get the wild sorority off the block. Unfortunately, the rebellious young women refuse to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Mindhunters
programme.desc: FBI agent Jake Harris (Val Kilmer) escorts a group of cadets to a remote island for simulation training. The cadets, under the leadership of J.D. (Christian Slater), will try to catch an imaginary serial killer within the island's elaborate facility. The FBI, however, is suspicious of Harris' methods and dispatch Gabe Jensen (LL Cool J) to act as an outside observer. What he finds is a simulation exercise that becomes dangerously real and training that becomes a fight for survival.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: The human race stands on the brink of extinction as a series of alien attacks decimate the planet, causing earthquakes, tsunamis and disease. Separated from her family, Ohio teenager Cassie Sullivan (Chloë Grace Moretz) will do whatever it takes to reunite with her brother Sam. Fate leads her to form an alliance with Evan Walker (Alex Roe), a mysterious young man who may be her last hope. Forced to trust each other, Cassie and Evan fight for survival during the fifth assault from the invaders.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: The human race stands on the brink of extinction as a series of alien attacks decimate the planet, causing earthquakes, tsunamis and disease. Separated from her family, Ohio teenager Cassie Sullivan (Chloë Grace Moretz) will do whatever it takes to reunite with her brother Sam. Fate leads her to form an alliance with Evan Walker (Alex Roe), a mysterious young man who may be her last hope. Forced to trust each other, Cassie and Evan fight for survival during the fifth assault from the invaders.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Everything that can possibly go wrong for groom-to-be Greg Focker does. The problems begin with Greg's disastrous first meeting with his girlfriend's family -- most notably her intimidating father Jack Byrnes, and it's all downhill from there.

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: Average Joe's Gym and its owner, Peter La Fleur (Vince Vaughn), are both down on their luck. A fancy competing gym called Globo-Gym, run by the maniacal health nut White Goodman (Ben Stiller), is about to put Average Joe's out of business unless Peter can raise $50,000 to keep his mortgage. To save the gym, Peter and a ragtag group of Average Joe's members and employees enter a dodgeball contest with a big cash prize. In response, White forms his own Globo-Gym team to rout the competition.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton!
programme.desc: Pete (Topher Grace), the quirky, self-deprecating manager of a grocery store, is madly in love with his best friend, Rosalee (Kate Bosworth). Unfortunately, she has absolutely no idea. When Rosalee wins a date with her favorite actor, the smarmy Tad Hamilton (Josh Duhamel), Pete delays admitting his feelings to her. And when the scheming Hamilton relocates to their small town to pursue Rosalee in the wake of their initial meeting, a horrified Pete must struggle to win her heart.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A young couple suffering from arrested development are forced to live next to a fraternity house after the birth of their newborn baby.

programme.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: Life is good for Mac Radner (Seth Rogen) and pregnant wife Kelly (Rose Byrne) until the unruly sisters of Kappa Nu move in next door. As the loud parties threaten the sale of their home, the couple turn to ex-neighbor and one-time enemy Teddy Sanders (Zac Efron) for help. Now united with the former college student, the trio devises schemes to get the wild sorority off the block. Unfortunately, the rebellious young women refuse to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: Average Joe's Gym and its owner, Peter La Fleur (Vince Vaughn), are both down on their luck. A fancy competing gym called Globo-Gym, run by the maniacal health nut White Goodman (Ben Stiller), is about to put Average Joe's out of business unless Peter can raise $50,000 to keep his mortgage. To save the gym, Peter and a ragtag group of Average Joe's members and employees enter a dodgeball contest with a big cash prize. In response, White forms his own Globo-Gym team to rout the competition.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Brad Whitaker (Will Ferrell) is a kindhearted radio executive who wants to be the best possible stepfather to his wife's (Linda Cardellini) two children. When her freewheeling ex-husband, Dusty (Mark Wahlberg), breezes back into town, Brad's feeling of insecurity quickly develops into an inferiority complex. As Dusty demonstrates his flair for athletics, home repair and bad-boy charisma, Whitaker finds himself in a no-holds-barred battle to one-up his rival and win the approval of his family.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Hotshot television anchorman Ron Burgundy welcomes upstart reporter Veronica Corningstone into the male-dominated world of 1970s broadcast news -- that is, until the talented female journalist begins to outshine Burgundy on air. Soon he grows jealous, begins a bitter feud with Veronica and eventually makes a vulgar slip on live TV that ruins his career. However, when an outrageous story breaks at the San Diego Zoo, Ron may get a chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Seven years after capturing the heart of co-anchor Veronica Corningstone (Christina Applegate), newsman Ron Burgundy (Will Ferrell) is offered the chance of a lifetime: a spot on the world's first 24-hour global cable news network. Ron quickly assembles his team: Champ Kind (David Koechner), Brian Fantana (Paul Rudd) and Brick Tamland (Steve Carell). Challenged by his tough female boss, a network owner and a popular anchor, Ron and his pals must find their own way to the top of the ratings.

programme.title: Permanent Midnight
programme.desc: As television writer Jerry Stahl (Ben Stiller) becomes more successful, his heroin habit grows worse. Already using when he comes to Los Angeles, Stahl finds his problems intensify when he moves in with his friend Nicky (Owen Wilson), also an addict. Eventually, Stahl marries producer Sandra (Elizabeth Hurley) to help her get a green card, and she gets him jobs on top television shows. However, more and more, he is unable to separate his addiction from his working life.

programme.title: Fall Time
programme.desc: In the 1950s America, three friends -- David (David Arquette), Joe (Jonah Blechman) and Tim (Jason London) -- get it in their heads to pull a prank in honor of their high school graduation. Staging a bank robbery and kidnapping, the three find they've picked the wrong bank at the wrong time when they clash with Florence (Mickey Rourke) and Leon (Stephen Baldwin) -- who are actually robbing the bank. After the two crooks take the friends hostage, the only way out is to go through with the robbery.

programme.title: Yes, Madam
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Agent Jack Ryan (Harrison Ford) becomes acting deputy director of the CIA when Admiral Greer (James Earl Jones) is diagnosed with cancer. When an American businessman, and friend of the president, is murdered on a yacht, Ryan starts discovering links between the man and drug dealers. As CIA agent John Clark (Willem Dafoe) is sent to Colombia to kill drug kingpins in retaliation, Ryan must fight through multiple cover-ups to figure out what happened and who's responsible.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. Together the unlikely trio ventures into hostile territory to dispense some Old West justice.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Frankie Dunn (Clint Eastwood) is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm's length, except his old friend and associate Eddie "Scrap Iron" Dupree (Morgan Freeman). When Maggie Fitzgerald (Hilary Swank) arrives in Frankie's gym seeking his expertise, he is reluctant to train the young woman, a transplant from working-class Missouri. Eventually, he relents, and the two form a close bond that will irrevocably change them both.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: After discovering his girlfriend has been participating in group sex, attorney Mitch feels his world come undone. He moves into a new place, which happens to be near a college campus, and tries to get his life back together. Two of his best friends, Frank and Beanie, start hanging out at Mitch's house, eventually turning the place into a wild party pad, much to the ire of the college's dean, Gordon "Cheese" Pritchard.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Strange Wilderness
programme.desc: Peter Gaulke takes over when his father, a respected wildlife TV host, dies, but receives far less success. When the show is threatened with cancellation, Peter and his know-nothing crew of stoners and idiots realize that only one creature can save the show: Bigfoot.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: Geophysicist Dr. Josh Keyes discovers that an unknown force has caused the Earth's inner core to stop rotating. With the planet's magnetic field rapidly deteriorating, our atmosphere literally starts to come apart at the seams with catastrophic consequences. To resolve the crisis, Keyes, along with a team of the world's most gifted scientists, travel into the Earth's core. Their mission: detonate a device that will reactivate the core.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: Geophysicist Dr. Josh Keyes discovers that an unknown force has caused the Earth's inner core to stop rotating. With the planet's magnetic field rapidly deteriorating, our atmosphere literally starts to come apart at the seams with catastrophic consequences. To resolve the crisis, Keyes, along with a team of the world's most gifted scientists, travel into the Earth's core. Their mission: detonate a device that will reactivate the core.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: As Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) ages, he finds that being the head of the Corleone crime family isn't getting any easier. He wants his family out of the Mafia, but the mob kingpin (Eli Wallach) isn't eager to let one of the most powerful and wealthy families go legit. Making matters even worse is Michael's nephew, Vincent (Andy Garcia). Not only does Vincent want a piece of the Corleone family's criminal empire, but he also wants Michael's daughter, Mary (Sofia Coppola).

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. It's operated by the Nurse, a no-nonsense, high-tech healer who already has her hands full of a French assassin, an arms dealer and an injured cop. As the violence of the night continues, the Nurse must decide whether to break her own rules and confront what she's worked so hard to avoid.

programme.desc: Noticias de última hora y titulares, previsiones meteorológicas locales, informes deportivos y de tráfico.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El paralelo 37 norte acumula tantos casos de objetos voladores no identificados, mutilaciones de animales y otros sucesos misteriosos que se le ha apodado la superautopista ovni.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Desde hace milenios, Escocia es un epicentro de fenómenos aparentemente provenientes de otro mundo. Escocia podría ser un imán para visitantes extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: El misterio de las esferas de piedra
programme.desc: En todo el mundo hay misteriosas piedras antiguas con una forma esférica perfecta. Muchas de ellas fueron claramente creadas por el hombre, pero otras desafían cualquier explicación lógica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: La ciudad perdida de los mayas
programme.desc: La civilización maya fue una de las más importantes de la historia del continente americano. La evidencia actual sugiere que los mayas estuvieron en contacto con extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Culturas de todo el mundo han creído durante miles de años que existen portales dimensionales diseminados por la Tierra, a través de los cuales han entrado criaturas de lugares lejanos del universo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: Jacques Vallée, pionero de los ovnis
programme.desc: El Dr. Vallée, autor de best sellers y uno de los padres de Internet, es más conocido por su trabajo en el campo de la ufología.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Desde miles de años atrás, la humanidad ha buscado contactarse con seres de más allá de la Tierra. En el siglo XXI, la búsqueda de inteligencia extraterrestre se ha intensificado.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El Gobierno estadounidense ha tomado medidas excepcionales para ocultar la verdad acerca de la presencia extraterrestre en la Tierra. Tratan de desacreditar a aquellos que osan revelar las evidencias.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: La Antártida podría ser la base para los visitantes extraterrestres en la Tierra, pero a medida que aumenta la exploración humana del continente congelado, podría encontrarse las ruinas de una antigua civilización avanzada bajo el hielo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Imágenes satelitales revelan la aparición de una cara gigante que parece estar tallada en la Tierra en Alberta, Canadá.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: La evidencia está entre nosotros
programme.sub-title: Lobos gigantes y choque en Marte
programme.desc: Avistamientos potenciales de una temida criatura filipina conocida como Aswang; un lobo en Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: Los archivos de Linda Moulton Howe
programme.desc: Linda Moulton Howe ha estudiado los misterios del planeta durante más de cuarenta años. ¿Acaso sus investigaciones no señalan la presencia de fenómenos sobrenaturales?

programme.desc: Linda Moulton Howe ha estudiado los misterios del planeta durante más de cuarenta años. ¿Acaso sus investigaciones no señalan la presencia de fenómenos sobrenaturales?

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Las culturas antiguas dejaron vestigios de encuentros con seres que descendieron del cielo. ¿Las estructuras megalíticas y los descubrimientos de torres de esqueletos demuestran que, en un pasado remoto, los gigantes habitaron la Tierra?

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: En todo el mundo se han encontrado objetos antiguos que los arqueólogos no pueden explicar. La pregunta es si estos inexplicables objetos indican que miles de años antes existieron civilizaciones avanzadas y, quizás incluso, extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Según la leyenda, maldiciones fueron puestas en las tumbas del rey Tutankamón y otros faraones. Los investigadores indican que las maldiciones surgieron como resultado de la tecnología alienígena con el propósito de proteger secretos sobre el pasado.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Arqueólogos y antropólogos hacen descubrimientos que no reciben atención, porque no encajan en el paradigma científico aceptado, como un martillo antiguo encontrado en Texas o cráneos alargados encontrados en casi todos los continentes.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores sugieren que el antiguo sitio de Teotihuacan en México central fue hogar a una civilización altamente avanzada, quizás extraterrestre; excavaciones en Teotihuacan han desenterrado descubrimientos fuera de lugar en el mundo antiguo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores encuentran que decenas de sitios megalíticos en todo el mundo fueron diseñados para emanar la misma frecuencia exacta, lo que les hace especular que ciertas frecuencias pueden permitir a los humanos conectarse con fuerzas alienígenas.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Una nota escrita al recientemente electo presidente Dwight Eisenhower por los oficiales que investigaron los ovnis en 1952, en la que hablan de un proyecto secreto en el que estaban involucrados científicos, agentes del gobierno y personal militar.

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: El desprecio por la vida que muestran los asesinos en serie. Los psicópatas y sádicos rara vez muestran arrepentimiento o empatía por las vidas que destruyen.

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: Se examina la fascinación que la humanidad, en todas sus culturas, ha sentido por la muerte desde las primeras civilizaciones hasta los grandes imperios del siglo XX.

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: Se examinan algunas de las plagas más devastadoras de la historia de la humanidad, así como los avances científicos para combatir estas enfermedades, incluido el desarrollo de la vacuna de Edward Jenner contra la viruela en la década de 1790.

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: Según el filósofo griego Platón, el continente perdido de la Atlántida fue hogar de una civilización muy avanzada que desapareció a causa de un cataclismo. ¿Se trata de una leyenda o un hecho real, oculto en la memoria de la humanidad?

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: Durante siglos, la humanidad se ha visto obligada a construir estructuras fabulosas que son mucho más que simples lugares de refugio o trabajo.

programme.title: Inexplicable, con William Shatner
programme.desc: Un vistazo a las razones que motivan a alguien a robar.

programme.title: El secreto de Skinwalker
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo lanza cohetes de alta tecnología en la zona, aparecen de repente fenómenos aéreos no identificados.

programme.title: Grandes misterios de la historia
programme.desc: Un poderoso activista sindical desaparece de un suburbio de Detroit. 45 años después, sigue siendo uno de los casos de personas desaparecidas más notorios de todos los tiempos. El misterio de la desaparición de Jimmy Hoffa.

programme.title: History's Most Shocking
programme.sub-title: Exploding Whale, Alligator Attack, Dallas Airshow Disaster & Ski Lift Mayhem
programme.desc: Un padre entra en acción para salvar a un adiestrador de animales del ataque de un caimán. Dos aviones militares de época chocan en una exhibición aérea en Dallas.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: En China, cientos de extraños discos son descubiertos en una cueva que parecería revelar la historia de una antigua colisión extraterrestre en la Tierra. Poco después, los discos son confiscados por el gobierno chino y descartados como una farsa.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El sitio antiguo de Gobekli Tepe desafía la creencia de los arqueólogos sobre el pasado; el complejo de piedra megalítica fue construido hace más de 12.000 años, 5.000 años antes de que la primer civilización conocida haya surgido en Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Grandes misterios de la historia
programme.desc: Un poderoso activista sindical desaparece de un suburbio de Detroit. 45 años después, sigue siendo uno de los casos de personas desaparecidas más notorios de todos los tiempos. El misterio de la desaparición de Jimmy Hoffa.

programme.title: History's Most Shocking
programme.sub-title: Exploding Whale, Alligator Attack, Dallas Airshow Disaster & Ski Lift Mayhem
programme.desc: Un padre entra en acción para salvar a un adiestrador de animales del ataque de un caimán. Dos aviones militares de época chocan en una exhibición aérea en Dallas.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: En China, cientos de extraños discos son descubiertos en una cueva que parecería revelar la historia de una antigua colisión extraterrestre en la Tierra. Poco después, los discos son confiscados por el gobierno chino y descartados como una farsa.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El sitio antiguo de Gobekli Tepe desafía la creencia de los arqueólogos sobre el pasado; el complejo de piedra megalítica fue construido hace más de 12.000 años, 5.000 años antes de que la primer civilización conocida haya surgido en Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: En China, cientos de extraños discos son descubiertos en una cueva que parecería revelar la historia de una antigua colisión extraterrestre en la Tierra. Poco después, los discos son confiscados por el gobierno chino y descartados como una farsa.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El sitio antiguo de Gobekli Tepe desafía la creencia de los arqueólogos sobre el pasado; el complejo de piedra megalítica fue construido hace más de 12.000 años, 5.000 años antes de que la primer civilización conocida haya surgido en Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Programación informativa y noticiero
programme.desc: Noticias de última hora y titulares, previsiones meteorológicas locales, informes deportivos y de tráfico.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Unete al servicio conducido por David Jeremiah en San Diego.

programme.title: Houdini
programme.desc: While working as a Coney Island entertainer, Harry Houdini (Tony Curtis) meets and falls madly in love with Bess (Janet Leigh). The two quickly marry, and with her at his side, the magician begins his rise to fame as the world's greatest escape artist and magician. But as the escapes get more and more dangerous, Bess worries that Harry may be taking his act too far. This biographical look at the life of Houdini takes several liberties with the facts, including how the magician actually died.

programme.title: Leviathan
programme.desc: Hired by Martin (Meg Foster), the head of a major corporation, a crew including geologist Steven Beck (Peter Weller) descends to the ocean's depths for a mining project. When the undersea explorers find a sunken ship and investigate, they inadvertently bring a malevolent life form on board their vessel. The creature kills some crew members and causes them to mutate, resulting in a battle for survival against an unknown force far below the surface of the ocean.

programme.title: The Purple Rose of Cairo
programme.desc: Unhappily married Depression-era waitress Cecilia (Mia Farrow) earns the money while her inattentive husband, Monk (Danny Aiello), blows their meager income on getting drunk and gambling. To assuage her loneliness, Cecilia escapes to the picture show and becomes transfixed with the movie The Purple Rose of Cairo, and especially with its lead character, archeologist Tom Baxter (Jeff Daniels). When Tom literally steps off of the screen and into her life, both realities are thrown into chaos.

programme.title: The Ladies' Man
programme.desc: Upon losing his lover, Herbert (Jerry Lewis) gives up women for good and seeks a fresh start by taking a maintenance position at what appears to be an ordinary Los Angeles boarding house. To Herbert's surprise, however, the building caters specifically to single women. He immediately resolves to quit, but landlady Miss Wellenmellon (Helen Traubel) and sweet tenant Fay (Pat Stanley) talk him into keeping the job. In no time at all, Herbert is mired in one comic disaster after another.

programme.title: The Man in the Moon
programme.desc: Maureen Trant (Emily Warfield) and her younger sibling Dani (Reese Witherspoon) share a strong connection, but local boy Court Foster (Jason London) threatens to throw their bond off balance. Dani and Court meet first and have a flirtatious rapport -- but when he meets Maureen, he falls hard and they begin a passionate affair. The new couple try to keep their love hidden from Dani, but she soon learns the truth, disavowing her sister. But a heartbreaking accident later reunites the girls.

programme.title: Cadillac Man
programme.desc: Car dealer Joey O'Brien (Robin Williams) is spread as thin financially as he is in his love life. He's dating more women than he can remember, and the local toughs he's borrowed money from want it back. In a last-ditch effort to get out of debt, Joey struggles to sell a dozen cars in two days -- a task that becomes difficult when the husband (Tim Robbins) of Joey's secretary (Annabella Sciorra) barges into the dealership with a semi-automatic weapon and takes everyone hostage.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max (Sigourney Weaver) and Page (Jennifer Love Hewitt) are a brilliant mother/daughter con team who have their grift down to a fine science. Max targets wealthy, willing men and marries them. Page then seduces them, and Max catches her husband in the act. Then it's off to palimony city and the next easy mark.

programme.title: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: British gangster George Thomason (Tom Georgeson) and his hapless aide, Ken Pile (Michael Palin), draft a pair of arrogant Americans, grifter Wanda Gerschwitz (Jamie Lee Curtis) and weapons expert Otto West (Kevin Kline), for a massive diamond heist. When the job goes badly, Wanda attempts to seduce George's stuffy lawyer, Archie Leach (John Cleese), to find out where George hid the diamonds. Meanwhile, Ken repeatedly attempts to kill an elderly woman (Patricia Hayes) who witnessed the robbery.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Bored billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) decides to entertain himself by stealing a Monet from a reputed museum. When Catherine Banning (Rene Russo), an investigator for the museum's insurance company, takes an interest in Crown, a complicated back-and-forth game with romantic undertones begins between them. In an attempt to find out where Banning's loyalties lie, Crown returns the painting and essentially turns himself in, hoping that Banning's feelings for him will lead to an escape.

programme.title: The Mexican
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Jerry Welbach, a reluctant bagman, who has been given two ultimatums: The first is from his mob boss to travel to Mexico and retrieve a priceless antique pistol, known as "the Mexican"... or suffer the consequences. The second is from his girlfriend Samantha to end his association with the mob. Jerry figures alive and in trouble with Samantha is better than the more permanent alternative, so he heads south of the border.

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) is a Miami mobster who gets sent by his boss, the psychopathic Bones Barboni (Dennis Farina), to collect a bad debt from Harry Zimm (Gene Hackman), a Hollywood producer who specializes in cheesy horror films. When Chili meets Harry's leading lady (Rene Russo), the romantic sparks fly. After pitching his own life story as a movie idea, Chili learns that being a mobster and being a Hollywood producer really aren't all that different.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: While Col. James Braddock (Chuck Norris) was serving in Vietnam, he fell in love with a woman named Lin Tan Cang (Miki Kim). However, he thought her to be dead and returned to the United States without her. Years later, Braddock is told that Lin is alive -- along with her son that he fathered. Acting against a direct order from the CIA, and with the help of a foreign missionary (Yehuda Efroni), he returns to Vietnam to find his family, taking on a communist general (Aki Aleong) along the way.

programme.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
programme.desc: In this D.H. Lawrence adaptation, Sir Clifford Chatterley returns home from war severely injured and impotent, causing tension in his marriage to Lady Constance Chatterley. Clifford gives his young wife permission to seek a lover from the upper classes, but Constance becomes ill from the strain of caring for her husband. A visiting nurse recommends fresh air for her recovery, which leads her into the arms of gamekeeper Oliver Mellors.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: African-American Philadelphia police detective Virgil Tibbs (Sidney Poitier) is arrested on suspicion of murder by Bill Gillespie (Rod Steiger), the racist police chief of tiny Sparta, Mississippi. After Tibbs proves not only his own innocence but that of another man, he joins forces with Gillespie to track down the real killer. Their investigation takes them through every social level of the town, with Tibbs making enemies as well as unlikely friends as he hunts for the truth.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: African-American Philadelphia police detective Virgil Tibbs (Sidney Poitier) is arrested on suspicion of murder by Bill Gillespie (Rod Steiger), the racist police chief of tiny Sparta, Mississippi. After Tibbs proves not only his own innocence but that of another man, he joins forces with Gillespie to track down the real killer. Their investigation takes them through every social level of the town, with Tibbs making enemies as well as unlikely friends as he hunts for the truth.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Following the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, injured veterans turn to adaptive athletics to heal their physical and emotional battle wounds.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: High school student Cody Banks wants nothing more than what every other teen wants: to survive the banality of adolescence and become an adult. However, Banks is no ordinary teen; he's a CIA agent. When he's not doing his homework, Banks is on the case, spying on fellow student Natalie Connors to get close to her father, a scientist who has invented killer nanobots designed to bring down the country.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments
programme.desc: Enjoying a life of ease in the court of Egypt's pharaoh, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage and, later, God's expectations of him. He dedicates himself to liberating his people from captivity and -- with the aid of plagues and divine intervention -- manages to lead them out of Egypt and across the Red Sea. A greater challenge comes in the form of the golden calf idol, however, and it takes an unforgettable visitation by God on Mount Sinai for Moses' mission to prevail.

programme.title: Days of Heaven
programme.desc: A screen poem about life in America at the turn of the century. A story of love and murder told through the voice of a child and expressive images of nature in 1916. A steelworker flees Chicago after a fight with his boss; he takes his little sister and girlfriend with him.

programme.title: Leviathan
programme.desc: Hired by Martin (Meg Foster), the head of a major corporation, a crew including geologist Steven Beck (Peter Weller) descends to the ocean's depths for a mining project. When the undersea explorers find a sunken ship and investigate, they inadvertently bring a malevolent life form on board their vessel. The creature kills some crew members and causes them to mutate, resulting in a battle for survival against an unknown force far below the surface of the ocean.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: King Kong
programme.desc: When a research ship is sent to explore an island thought to be rich in oil, paleontologist Jack Prescott (Jeff Bridges) sneaks aboard, having heard strange rumors about the island. En route, the crew rescues Dwan (Jessica Lange), the sole survivor of a shipwreck. When they arrive, they find native people living in fear of a monster called Kong. The natives kidnap Dwan and sacrifice her to what turns out to be an enormous ape. Dwan is eventually rescued, and the ape captured for a gala exhibit.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: David Raskin is a high-school science nerd who dreams of going to MIT. When he and his friends find his late father's plans for a "temporal displacement device," David can't wait to start tinkering. When they finally get the device to work, the teenagers jump at the opportunity to manipulate time in their favor -- but their joy is short-lived when they begin to discover the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Divers Sam and Jared love life in the Bahamas. But when friends Bryce and Amanda visit, the couple take them on a treasure-hunting trip, where they discover more than they bargained for, a downed airplane full of cocaine alongside a famous shipwreck. Unknown to Sam and Jared, Bryce makes a fatal mistake and decides to sell the cocaine, which angers a group of drug dealers, who are in hot pursuit of the divers.

programme.title: Curse of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: When legendary Inspector Clouseau (Roger Moore) goes missing, New York police officer Clifton Sleigh (Ted Wass) is enlisted to find him. But Sleigh turns out to be the only detective in the world more incompetent than Clouseau himself. Traveling to France, Sleigh bumbles his way into and out of trouble, while encountering a number of characters from Clouseau's past, including the charismatic jewel thief Charles Litton (David Niven) and his womanizing nephew, George (Robert Wagner).

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: A gentle Jewish-Italian waiter, Guido Orefice (Roberto Benigni), meets Dora (Nicoletta Braschi), a pretty schoolteacher, and wins her over with his charm and humor. Eventually they marry and have a son, Giosue (Giorgio Cantarini). Their happiness is abruptly halted, however, when Guido and Giosue are separated from Dora and taken to a concentration camp. Determined to shelter his son from the horrors of his surroundings, Guido convinces Giosue that their time in the camp is merely a game.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Daniel (Ralph Macchio) moves to Southern California with his mother, Lucille (Randee Heller), but quickly finds himself the target of a group of bullies who study karate at the Cobra Kai dojo. Fortunately, Daniel befriends Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita), an unassuming repairman who just happens to be a martial arts master himself. Miyagi takes Daniel under his wing, training him in a more compassionate form of karate and preparing him to compete against the brutal Cobra Kai.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

programme.title: Real Genius
programme.desc: When science whiz Mitch Taylor (Gabe Jarret) arrives at Pacific Tech as a freshman, he's paired up with genius senior Chris Knight (Val Kilmer) to work on a laser project. Mitch initially doesn't care for Knight's slacker attitude, but is eventually won over, and their friendship allows them to make new progress on the laser project. It's only when the boys learn that the government intends to use the laser as a weapon that they start to question what they've actually been working for.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: An unemployed pot-smoking slacker and amateur drummer, Anthony Stoner (Tommy Chong) ditches his strict parents and hits the road, eventually meeting kindred spirit Pedro de Pacas (Cheech Marin). While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye."

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: This coming-of-age film follows the mayhem of a group of rowdy teenagers in Austin, Texas, celebrating the last day of high school in 1976. The graduating class heads for a popular pool hall and joins an impromptu keg party, however star football player Randall Pink Floyd has promised to focus on the championship game and abstain from partying. Meanwhile, the incoming freshmen try to avoid being hazed by the seniors, most notably the sadistic bully Fred O'Bannion.

programme.title: Animal House
programme.desc: When they arrive at college, socially inept freshmen Larry (Thomas Hulce) and Kent (Stephen Furst) attempt to pledge the snooty Omega Theta Pi House, but are summarily rejected. Lowering their standards, they try at the notoriously rowdy Delta Tau Chi House, and get in. The trouble is, the college dean (John Vernon) has it in for the Deltas. He has put them on "Double Secret Probation" and secretly assigned Omega's president (James Daughton) the task of having their charter revoked.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After his release from prison, Jake (John Belushi) reunites with his brother, Elwood (Dan Aykroyd) -- collectively known as the "Blues Brothers." Jake's first task is to save the orphanage the brothers grew up in from closing, by raising $5,000 to pay back taxes. The two are convinced they can earn the money by getting their old band back together. However, after playing several gigs and making a few enemies, including the police, the brothers face daunting odds to deliver the money on time.

programme.title: Fast Times at Ridgemont High
programme.desc: Stacy Hamilton (Jennifer Jason Leigh) is a pretty, but inexperienced, teen interested in dating. Given advice by her uninhibited friend, Linda Barrett (Phoebe Cates), Stacy gets trapped in a love triangle with nice guy Mark Ratner (Brian Backer) and his more assured buddy Mike Damone (Robert Romanus). Meanwhile, Stacy's classmate Jeff Spicoli (Sean Penn), who lives for surfing and being stoned, faces off against Mr. Hand (Ray Walston), a strict teacher who has no time for the slacker's antics.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

programme.title: Real Genius
programme.desc: When science whiz Mitch Taylor (Gabe Jarret) arrives at Pacific Tech as a freshman, he's paired up with genius senior Chris Knight (Val Kilmer) to work on a laser project. Mitch initially doesn't care for Knight's slacker attitude, but is eventually won over, and their friendship allows them to make new progress on the laser project. It's only when the boys learn that the government intends to use the laser as a weapon that they start to question what they've actually been working for.

While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye."

Meanwhile, the incoming freshmen try to avoid being hazed by the seniors, most notably the sadistic bully Fred O'Bannion.

programme.title: Animal House

Lowering their standards, they try at the notoriously rowdy Delta Tau Chi House, and get in. The trouble is, the college dean (John Vernon) has it in for the Deltas. He has put them on "Double Secret Probation" and secretly assigned Omega's president (James Daughton) the task of having their charter revoked.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After his release from prison, Jake (John Belushi) reunites with his brother, Elwood (Dan Aykroyd) -- collectively known as the "Blues Brothers." Jake's first task is to save the orphanage the brothers grew up in from closing, by raising $5,000 to pay back taxes. The two are convinced they can earn the money by getting their old band back together. However, after playing several gigs and making a few enemies, including the police, the brothers face daunting odds to deliver the money on time.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: Accompanied by their children, Clark Griswold and his wife, Ellen, are driving from Illinois to a California amusement park. As Clark increasingly fixates on a beautiful woman driving a sports car, the Griswolds deal with car problems and the death of a family member. They reach Los Angeles, but, when Clark worries that the trip is being derailed again, he acts impulsively to get his family to the park.

programme.title: National Lampoon's European Vacation
programme.desc: After winning a European vacation on a game show, Clark Griswold convinces his reluctant family to accompany him. His wife, Ellen, is excited, but daughter Audrey is reluctant to leave her boyfriend behind, while teen son Rusty dreams of meeting girls. After arriving in London, the clan encounters one disaster after another as they travel through France, Germany and Italy, while Clark's attempts to cheer everyone up make things worse.

programme.title: Vegas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswolds are off on a family outing to Las Vegas, where they each have their own misadventures. Hapless dad Clark Griswold immediately starts losing money at blackjack, while his wife, Ellen, develops a crush on lounge performer Wayne Newton. Elsewhere, young Rusty is enthusiastically playing dice, and his sister, Audrey, winds up in seedy nightclubs. Can the family reunite and stay out of trouble?

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: As the holidays approach, Clark Griswold (Chevy Chase) wants to have a perfect family Christmas, so he pesters his wife, Ellen (Beverly D'Angelo), and children, as he tries to make sure everything is in line, including the tree and house decorations. However, things go awry quickly. His hick cousin, Eddie (Randy Quaid), and his family show up unplanned and start living in their camper on the Griswold property. Even worse, Clark's employers renege on the holiday bonus he needs.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When his young children are abducted by his old nemesis, Capt. Hook (Dustin Hoffman) middle-aged lawyer Peter Banning (Robin Williams) returns to his magical origins as Peter Pan. Peter must revisit a foggy past in which he abandoned Neverland for family life, leaving Tinkerbell (Julia Roberts) and the Lost Boys to fend for themselves. Given their bitterness toward Peter for growing up -- and their allegiance to their new leader, Rufio -- the old gang may not be happy to see him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Mac quits his job after he inherits $2 million -- then he's sued for over $4 million.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) is called to active duty by his Army Reserve unit. With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: The court staff holds a memorial service for Dan (John Larroquette). With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob is alone and on a mission. HIs target? Sight fishing Shallow water sharks on fly.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Korey Sprengel tours Green Bay while casting small glide baits for large Perch.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Elite pro Bryan New joins us for exciting fall fishing on Oklahoma's Lake Tenkiller.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Catching Crappie with a Professional P2
programme.desc: The excitement continues in part 2 with Bill and Randy catching more monster crappie on Bull Shoals.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Host Mark Courts and Berkley's Mark Sexton have to slow down and bulk up to catch trophy largemouth bass.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four Teams compete in Oxford, AL for Elimination Match 3 of the Patriot Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion anglers Ott DeFoe and Chris Lane battle some of the biggest monster bass of the season.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam is at one of his favorite lakes in Alabama catching them on topwater before the Toyota Owner's Event.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Pro Bass angler Adam Rasmussen joins ZAFS for a smallmouth adventure into the hallowed waters of Sturgeon Bay.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.sub-title: Monsters of the Moment-Times, Places and Presentations
programme.desc: It's fast and frenzied fishing action for some of North America's most prodigious sportfish as the In-Fisherman staff takes you for mauling and brawling muskies; heading to one of North America's finest waters for giant smallmouth bass; taking you into the Alaskan wilderness to reveal the nature of record-class northern pike, including a 54-inch monster that's the biggest pike ever captured in almost 50 years of filming In-Fisherman TV.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: The Aleutian Islands are some of the most remote places in the world to hunt and they host the mighty reindeer, the largest antler-to-body animal in North America.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim sits down with Jack Zimmerman to share his inspiring story of resilience, exploring how Jack continues to pursue hunting adventures around the world despite the challenges he faces as a double amputee veteran.

programme.title: Hunt Masters
programme.desc: After thirteen years of applying for a coveted northern Nevada mule deer tag, Gregg Ritz finally draws a spot-and-stalk archery mule deer hunt on public land.

programme.title: Drop Zone
programme.desc: With the rut in full swing, the boys look to score with their Brownings in this game wide-open terrain.

programme.title: Tracks Across Africa
programme.sub-title: When the Hunting Gods Smile on Dande
programme.desc: Charlton McCallum Safaris PH Myles McCallum and hunter Terry Patrick are in Zimbabwe's Dande Safari Area on a wonderful mixed-bag safari for both dangerous and plains game species that call the Lower Zambezi Valley home.

programme.title: Bowlife
programme.desc: Levi is chasing mule deer and whitetail out west!

programme.title: Heartland Bowhunter
programme.desc: Steve and Ty have been hunting together for quite a few years, but this year they have a buck to be especially excited about -- a true deer of a lifetime!

programme.title: Whitetail Freaks
programme.desc: Billy See takes his daughter Hannah, his girlfriend Aubrey hunting while still after a buck of his own by gun.

programme.title: Driven With Pat & Nicole
programme.desc: Nicole heads to the backcountry of British Columbia while the elk rut is in full swing.

programme.title: Bone Collector
programme.desc: Pecans, chickens, and whitetail deer.

programme.title: Buck Commander
programme.desc: Willie Robertson goes to Mississippi to hunt velvet deer for archery season.

programme.title: Headhunters TV
programme.desc: Homework makes the dream work after Randy, Cody & Big Rig labor all summer to get the Dirty Bird where they want it just in time for deer season.

programme.title: Renovation Hunters
programme.desc: Renovation Hunters remembers the highlights of the last 4 years and shares exciting things to come.

programme.title: Nick's Wild Ride With Nick Hoffman
programme.desc: Nick heads south to Texas to hunt and explores an iconic historical site.

programme.title: Dropped: Arctic Drift
programme.desc: With 24 hours remaining and 20 miles to the extraction point, a massive blizzard moves into the Brooks Range forcing Chris and Casey to make some tough decisions in order to make it out of the Brooks Range safely.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries

programme.title: Prince: When Doves Cry
programme.desc: Although Prince was hailed as a musical genius, his music revealed turmoil and sadness, and Prince could not escape his loneliness, fear and self-blame when he wasn't onstage.

programme.title: Odd Jobs
programme.desc: The summer job situation looks bleak for five college pals until they decide to start their own moving business.

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin's newly arrived godson (Tom Sturridge) loses his virginity.

programme.title: The Lost Husband
programme.desc: A widow and her children move to her estranged aunt's farm in Texas.

programme.title: Waitress: The Musical
programme.desc: Jenna Hunterson is a waitress and expert pie maker stuck in a small town and a loveless marriage. When a baking contest offers her a chance at escape, Jenna fights to reclaim part of herself.

programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: Peter Highman will be a dad for the first time when his wife gives birth in five days. He intends to catch a flight home from Atlanta so he can be there for the delivery, but a chance encounter with aspiring actor Ethan Tremblay throws a monkey wrench into his plans. Desperate to reach his wife before their baby is born, Peter's sanity is tested when he must take a road trip cross-country with dog-toting Ethan.

programme.title: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: After a disastrous first date, the only things Holly Berenson and Eric Messer have in common are mutual dislike and their love for their goddaughter, Sophie. When they unexpectedly become her caretakers, Holly and Eric have to put aside their differences and learn to work together for the sake of the child. Juggling competing career and social commitments, Holly and Eric look for common ground while living under the same roof.

programme.title: Sing Sing
programme.desc: A man is imprisoned at Sing Sing for a crime he didn't commit. When joined by a wary outsider, he finds purpose in staging an original comedy with a theater group of other incarcerated men.

programme.title: Nico, 1988
programme.desc: Approaching age 50, singer/songwriter Nico leads a solitary existence -- far from her days as a Warhol superstar and celebrated vocalist for the Velvet Underground in the 1960s. Her life and career on the fringes, Nico's new manager convinces her to hit the road again and tour in Europe to promote her latest album. Struggling with demons and the consequences of a muddled life, she longs to rebuild a relationship with her son, whose custody she lost long ago.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: Supergirl
programme.desc: Kara (Helen Slater) of Argo City poses as Clark Kent's cousin, Linda Lee, to recover the Omegahedron from a witch (Faye Dunaway).

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

programme.title: Elevation
programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic survivors find refuge in the Rocky Mountains to hide from giant, insect-like creatures that can't live above 8,000 feet. However, when one of them needs life-saving supplies, they risk it all to venture into the danger zone.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Though Kevin has evidenced 23 personalities to his trusted psychiatrist, Dr. Fletcher, there remains one still submerged who is set to materialize and dominate all the others. Compelled to abduct three teenage girls led by the willful, observant Casey, Kevin reaches a war for survival among all of those contained within him -- as well as everyone around him -- as the walls between his compartments shatter.

programme.title: Heretic
programme.desc: A diabolical Mr. Reed ensnares two young missionaries in a terrifying game of cat and mouse when they knock on the wrong door and are forced to prove their faith.

programme.title: Heretic
programme.desc: A diabolical Mr. Reed ensnares two young missionaries in a terrifying game of cat and mouse when they knock on the wrong door and are forced to prove their faith.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman (Toni Collette) undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend (Drew Barrymore) tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Texas border patrolmen (Kris Kristofferson, Treat Williams) find a jeep, a skeleton and $800,000 in cash dating from 1963.

programme.title: Raise Hell: The Life & Times of Molly Ivins
programme.desc: The life and work of Molly Ivins, a political journalist from Texas, best-selling author, and Bill of Rights warrior.

programme.title: Patti Cake$
programme.desc: Fed up with life in her New Jersey hometown, Patricia Dombrowski, aka Patti Cake$, hopes to follow in the footsteps of her idol and hit the road to achieve stardom as a rapper. With help from her best friend, a mysterious musician and her loving grandmother, Patti leads the charge against an army of haters, unpaid bills and the broken dreams that are holding her back.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day. Then Valerie suspects that the werewolf is someone she loves.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: Young couple Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) and Kisha (Essence Atkins) have just moved into their dream home. As they settle in, they learn that they're not alone -- not because the house is haunted, but because Kisha is possessed by a demon. Desperate to salvage his relationship -- and more importantly -- his sex life -- Malcolm hires a coterie of paranormal specialists, which includes a priest and ghostbusters, to banish the unwelcome intruder from Kisha's body.

programme.title: A Haunted House 2
programme.desc: After the ordeal he suffered with his now former girlfriend's (Essence Atkins) demonic possession, Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) has decided to start fresh. He has a new girlfriend named Megan (Jaime Pressly), and they and Megan's children are moving into their dream home. Soon afterward, Malcolm is once again plagued by supernatural shenanigans -- only this time, it's not just the house that's haunted. A demon has attached itself to Malcolm, and shows no signs of letting go.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: Depression-era bank robber John Dillinger's charm and audacity endear him to much of America's downtrodden public, but he's also a thorn in the side of J. Edgar Hoover and the fledgling FBI. Desperate to capture the elusive outlaw, Hoover makes Dillinger his first Public Enemy Number One and assigns his top agent, Melvin Purvis, the task of bringing him in dead or alive.

programme.title: Glass
programme.desc: David Dunn tries to stay one step ahead of the law while delivering vigilante justice on the streets of Philadelphia. His special talents soon put him on a collision course with the Beast -- the psychotic madman who has superhuman strength and 23 distinct personalities. Their epic showdown leads them to an encounter with the mysterious Elijah Price, the criminal mastermind who holds critical secrets for both men.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. Under assignment from the minister of defense, the duo embarks on a mission to Alpha, an ever-expanding metropolis where diverse species gather to share knowledge and culture. When a dark force threatens the peaceful city, Valerian and Laureline must race against time to identify the menace that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Woodshock
programme.desc: A haunted young woman spirals into confusion and chaos after she falls under the spell of a potent, reality-altering drug.

programme.desc: Brightening up the morning with this mix of music videos featuring jams from yesterday and today; curated for her.

programme.desc: Andy and Barney must figure out a way to prevent a farmer's goat who has eaten a load of dynamite from blowing up Mayberry.
